description_long: This is a modern two-story house set on a rectangular plot with a well-maintained lawn and several mature trees. The house features a prominent hip roof with a central chimney and a mix of beige and gray exterior walls, accented by large glass windows and a glass-enclosed sunroom at the rear. A detached garage with a flat roof is positioned to the side, connected by a paved driveway. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool and a patio area, partially shaded by the sunroom. The landscaping is minimalistic, with trimmed grass and a few strategically placed shrubs and trees. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and modern materials.
description: A modern two-story house with a hip roof, large windows, a detached garage, and a backyard pool, surrounded by a landscaped lawn and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central chimney, detached garage, and landscaped front yard with two trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the glass sunroom extending toward the backyard pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the glass sunroom, large backyard pool, and dense tree coverage on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the sunroom, pool, and the main house structure with large windows and minimal landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels and a glass sunroom
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small overhang, and a paved path leading from the driveway, flanked by minimal landscaping.
